Our Mission

At StakeLayer, our mission is to democratize Bitcoin earnings, making it accessible, profitable, and secure for investors worldwide. Leveraging advanced blockchain technology, we're committed to providing a transparent, efficient, and revolutionary restaking solution.

Restaking Architecture

Deposit BTC
Earn BTC Yield
Stake Layer Token Boost
BTC Vault Staking

Chain:ETH -> sWBTC, sETH, sUSDT, sUSDCBSC -> sBTCB, sBNB, sUSDC

Cefi

Bug Bounty

PR

New Era of DeFi on Bitcoin, StakeLayer, a Bitcoin staking L2 is Coming to Token2049

This April, StakeLayer emerging on Dubai's blockchain scene. They'll be at Token2049 (April 18th-19th), the industry leader gathering, showcasing their innovative DeFi solution. Don't miss them earlier at BlockchainLife (April 15th-16th) where they'll connect with the audience.

StakeLayer Launches The First Bitcoin Restaking L2, as BlackRock Shows Institutional Crypto Interest

StakeLayer presents a novel approach to unlocking new functionalities for Bitcoin, introducing a revolutionary EeigenLayer on Bitcoin. By introducing restaking on Bitcoin’s L2, it opens doors for increased capital efficiency, potential security benefits, and a wider range of applications built on the Bitcoin network.

EigenLayer on Bitcoin, StakeLayer Announced The Pre-Sale Distribution

StakeLayer introduces a revolutionary EigenLayer for Bitcoin. This new Layer 2 solution introduces Restaking for Bitcoin holders, poised to transform user interaction with Bitcoin.

New Era of DeFi on Bitcoin, StakeLayer, a Bitcoin staking L2 is Coming to Token2049

StakeLayer will offer unique yield opportunities for Bitcoin holders. By participating in the StakeLayer ecosystem, users can earn rewards beyond the traditional methods available on the Bitcoin network. This enhances the capital efficiency of their Bitcoin holdings.

StakeLayer Launches The First Bitcoin Restaking L2, as BlackRock Shows Institutional Crypto Interest

The recent news of BlackRock, a major investment giant, entering the cryptocurrency market sent shockwaves through the industry. This move signifies growing institutional interest in crypto assets, particularly Bitcoin. But what if Bitcoin holders could not only hold this valuable asset but also earn additional rewards on their holdings?

New Era of DeFi on Bitcoin, StakeLayer, a Bitcoin staking L2 is Coming to Token2049

Similar to EigenLayer on Ethereum, StakeLayer utilizes a restaking mechanism for Bitcoin. This allows Bitcoin holders to earn additional rewards on their holdings by participating in Proof-of-Stake activities on various applications built on Bitcoin’s L2. Traditionally, Bitcoin utilizes Proof-of-Work for consensus, but StakeLayer opens doors for Bitcoin to participate in the PoS world.

raise with us

Stake Bitcoin

For the first time ever, Bitcoin enthusiasts have the opportunity to generate income from their dormant Bitcoin assets securely without the need to entrust a third party or bridge their Bitcoin to a different blockchain.

Earn Altcoin Yield

By locking their Bitcoin in a manner that ensures they retain custody, holders are empowered to validate transactions on Proof of Stake (PoS) chains, earning returns in the process.

progression

RoadMap

  • Q1 2024

    Technical Development Framework

    • Conceptualization of the Bitcoin Restaking Layer2
    • Formation of the initial project team
    • Development kickoff, architectural design
  • Q2 2024

    Prelaunch

    • Begin building partnerships with key stakeholders in the Bitcoin and Layer2 ecosystems
    • Establishment of the project's online presence, including the official website, and engagement channels for community interaction.
    • Launch of a presale campaign to secure initial funding and distribute the project's native tokens to early backers.
    • StakeLayer Early Access for the early adopters
  • Q3 2024

    Alpha Release

    • Launch of an alpha version of the Layer2 solution for internal testing and refinement.
    • Initiation of a comprehensive marketing strategy to raise awareness and attract potential users and investors.
    • Opening Up StakeLayer for community testing and feedback.
  • Q4 2024

    Mainnet Launch and Ecosystem Development

    • Official launch of the Bitcoin Restaking Layer2 solution on the mainnet, marking the project's full operational status.
    • Scaling the infrastructure to accommodate a growing number of transactions and participants.
    • Foster a vibrant ecosystem around the Bitcoin Restaking Layer2 project by supporting developers, entrepreneurs, and projects building on or integrating with the platform.

path to the future

Frequently asked questions

What is StakeLayer?

StakeLayer is the first-ever Bitcoin Restaking L2 solution. The StakeLayer network is secured by staking both Bitcoin and StakeLayer tokens.

How can I buy $STAKE?

You can buy $STAKE with crypto or credit card. At the moment, we support ETH, BSC, OP, ARB, BASE, AVAX, and MATIC chains.

Which country is restricted for participation in the presale?

The following countries are not allowed to participate in the presale: United States of America (including its territories), Democratic People’s Republic of Korea, Cuba, Syria, Iran, Sudan, Crimea, People’s Republic of China, Bahamas, Botswana, Burundi, Cambodia, Central African Republic, The Democratic Republic of the Congo, Côte d’Ivoire, Cuba, Ethiopia, Ghana, Islamic Republic of Iran, Iraq, Libya, Mali, Myanmar, Somalia, South Sudan, Sri Lanka, Sudan, Syrian Arab Republic, Trinidad and Tobago, Bolivarian Republic of Venezuela, Yemen, and Zimbabwe.

When will be the TGE?

Token Generation Event (TGE) is planned for Q2 2024, it will happen once the Presale is fully filled. Please follow our social media to stay updated.

Why are Layer 2 scaling solutions for Bitcoin needed?

Layer 2 scaling solutions are essential for Bitcoin because they address the inherent scalability limitations of the main blockchain. Bitcoin was intentionally designed with a limited script to reduce the blockchain’s attack surface and increase its security and durability. But, as Bitcoin gains popularity and usage increases, the capacity of the primary blockchain can become constrained by high demand for block space, leading to slower confirmation times and higher transaction fees.
